items.title: Don Iwerks, Disney Legend, Oscar-Winning Inventor, And Pioneer Of Immersive Cinema, Dies At 96
items.desc: Oscar-winning inventor Don Iwerks transformed Disney attractions, large-format cinema, and 3D filmmaking across six decades.

items.title: Cocomi endorses UNC economic blockade
items.desc: COCOMI backs UNC’s inter-district economic blockade in Manipur after fresh arson in Imphal West; blockade began after six abducted Naga civilians were found dead.

items.title: Iran fires at two ships on the Strait of Hormuz as traffic sinks to lowest in 5 weeks
items.desc: Iran's military said it intercepted two ships attempting to cross the Strait of Hormuz on Monday as traffic along the key trade route plummeted to its lowest point in five weeks.

items.desc: Advocacy groups have pushed hard for certain conditions to be included on the WHO list of neglected tropical diseases.

items.desc:

items.title: NMC corporators to get Rs 100 crore for ward development works in FY27
items.desc: Nashik Municipal Corporation proposes Rs 100 crore ward development fund for FY27—Rs 50 crore new allocation plus Rs 50 crore unspent from FY26, pending GB approval.

items.title: Israeli forces nab 14 suspects after probe into Judea, Samaria explosive materials
items.desc: Israeli security forces arrested 14 people suspected of smuggling dual-use chemicals used to manufacture explosives for terrorist groups in Judea and Samaria, the Israel Police said on Monday.

items.title: Centre notifies Bhogapuram as immigration check post
items.desc: Centre notifies Bhogapuram Greenfield Airport as an Immigration Check Post, enabling international passenger operations; Andhra Pradesh’s third ICP after Visakhapatnam and Tirupati.

items.title: Kolhapur’s ‘One Day for the Farmer’ initiative brings ministers & officials to fields to understand growers’ concerns
items.desc: Kolhapur’s “One Day For The Farmer” drive saw ministers and officials work in fields, discuss paddy issues, and brief farmers on schemes and natural farming.

items.title: Beed police’s AI platform clears test, may transform criminal investigations across Maharashtra
items.desc: Beed police’s DeepEye AI clears state evaluation; speeds FIR drafting to 3–4 minutes and supports end-to-end investigations, boosting Maharashtra rollout prospects.

items.title: Man dies as BJP neta-builder’s son hits scooter; FIR filed
items.desc: Builder’s son Avinash Mutha booked after electric car allegedly hit a scooter in Ulhasnagar, killing 51-year-old carpenter; police seized vehicle, probe on.
